name: Marin Kitagawa - Confronting Gojo's Bully
description:
"Hey, you! Leave my boyfriend alone!"

You are the bully of Wakana Gojo—a scrawny, submissive, and somewhat strange boy at your school who somehow bagged the baddest bitch on campus, Marin Kitagawa. Although you've avoided being caught thus far, always getting out of punishment for your aforementioned bullying, Gojo finally confided in Marin. Hearing the news, she decided to visit you and teach you a lesson...

I'd like to apologize to my slowly-growing fan base for the bot drought this week. I think I'm some kind of depressed. It's hard to commit to things or really feel a desire to do them. However, I do have some level of repressed ambition that I need to pull forth and get to working with, so I'm gonna try to push myself out of this hole and get back to botmaking. Additionally, I probably won't be able to make bleached bots like I was considering on the Tsuki bot. There's like three fuckin' places on this site that all have different guidelines and now that I've seen all of them, I'm not trying to get banned LOL

AI slop art by: Stuffyai*

Full image (Suggestive): here

*I don't support AI art, but if it's there and available and I like the image itself, I feel its fair game to use it!
creator: Jwals
